notes: Falsifier f-standard-sirens (GW sirens at +/-1 km/s/Mpc) is branch-independent. Couples to cdl-dark-energy-eos (A3): evolving w reshapes the early-branch conditional. contested: intra-branch spread.

stipulations.name: sh0es_2022
stipulations.source: Riess et al. ApJL 934 L7 (Cepheid ladder)

verdict: NONIDENTIFIABLE(model-vs-systematic): early- and late-branch H0 are each conditional forward maps; identification requires a branch-independent probe

verdict_detail.reading: early-branch pair internally consistent; late branch has method spread (SH0ES vs CCHP); headline tension ~5 sigma and hardening — JWST crowding checks removed the leading systematic candidate on the ladder side

witness.statement: if a single H0 existed and both branches' conditionals held, all pairwise sigmas would be O(1); they are not
